description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On June 3, 2024 at 4:54 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Marina Del Rey, California was in a collision 
involving a passenger car on Admiralty Way at Bali Way.  
 
The Waymo AV was making a left turn from the rightmost dedicated left turn lane on Admiralty Way into lane two of three lanes in the 
eastbound direction of Bali Way. A passenger car was also making a left turn from the leftmost dedicated left turn lane (leftmost lane). The 
passenger car had made the turn onto Bali Way and was partially in the number 1 lane (leftmost) and partially in the number 2 lane (middle) 
when the front passenger side of the passenger car made contact with the rear driver side of the Waymo AV, which was traveling in the 
number 2 lane (middle). At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode, and a test driver was 
present (in the driver’s seating position). Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
